original_question: A very special island is inhabited only by knights and knaves. Knights always tell the truth, and knaves always lie. You meet 4 inhabitants: Ethan, Abigail, David, and Noah. Ethan asserted: "David is a knave or Abigail is a knave". Abigail was heard saying, "If Abigail is a knight then David is a knight". "Noah is a knight and Ethan is a knave" - David. Noah remarked, "Abigail is a knave if and only if Ethan is a knight". So who is a knight and who is a knave?

similar_questions.question: A very special island is inhabited only by knights and knaves. Knights always tell the truth, and knaves always lie. You meet 4 inhabitants: Clara, Michael, Sara, and Jack. Clara asserted: "Sara is a knave or Michael is a knave". Michael was heard saying, "If Clara is a knight then Sara is a knight". "Jack is a knight and Clara is a knave" - Sara. Jack remarked, "Michael is a knave if and only if Clara is a knight". So who is a knight and who is a knave?
